experience.title: System Engineer
info: Developed and maintained responsive frontend components using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, ensuring clean UI implementation and improved user experience.
Worked extensively with TIBCO Business Workspace, creating multiple integrations, schemas, and workflows for enterprise system automation.
Designed and implemented system integrations using SQL-based data handling, enabling smooth data exchange between enterprise applications.
Completed foundational training in Java, SQL, and web technologies as a fresher and collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver reliable and scalable software solutions.

experience.title: Software Engineer
info: Developed scalable frontend applications using React.js and built secure RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express, including backend integration and database schema design for enterprise applications.
Contributed to a regulatory-compliant Loan Origination System, ensuring secure data handling, optimized performance, and reliable microservices communication within a monorepo architecture
Debugged production issues using DOM inspection, browser DevTools, and AWS CloudWatch logs, identifying root causes and resolving critical runtime errors efficiently.
Managed multi-environment deployments (Dev, QA, UAT, Prod) using Git/GitHub workflows, pull requests, and AWS CI/CD pipelines, ensuring smooth and reliable application releases.

Tested and validated APIs using Postman, monitored network requests/responses, configured CORS for cross-origin communication, and improved code quality through Jest unit testing, code reviews, and Agile best practices.
